title: OUTPATIENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient programs are based on individual treatment plans and may include individual therapy, group therapy, family therapy, wellness services, care coordination/case management, skills training, parenting education, and psychiatric services. School consultation is available to child's school to share information and provide support. Therapy can be provided in child's school or other community locations. Parent involvement in therapy is required. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, some evening appointments Email (541) 726-1465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 726-1465 Main phone (888) 989-9990 Hotline Intake (541) 726-1465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment and information FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid) and most private insurances, sliding scale fee, some scholarships available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable; proof of income if applying for a sliding scale fee LANGUAGES: English, limited Spanish, German, Chinese, Taiwanese AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Parent Counseling Psychiatric Case Management Social Skills Training Wellness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH
